PostToolUse.name: requirements-changed
PostToolUse.description: When requirements.txt is modified, suggest installing dependencies

hooks.prompt:
requirements.txt was modified. Install updated dependencies:

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

For Docker environments: `docker compose up -d --build`

PostToolUse.name: odoo-conf-changed
PostToolUse.description: When an Odoo .conf file is modified, suggest restarting the server

hooks.prompt:
Odoo config file was modified. Restart the server to apply changes:

```bash
/odoo-stop
/odoo-start
```

Or restart manually: stop the process on port 8069, then start with the updated config.

PostToolUse.name: docker-compose-changed
PostToolUse.description: When docker-compose.yml is modified, suggest recreating containers

hooks.prompt:
docker-compose file was modified. Recreate containers:

```bash
docker compose up -d

# If service definitions changed
docker compose down && docker compose up -d
```

PostToolUse.name: dockerfile-changed
PostToolUse.description: When Dockerfile is modified, suggest rebuilding the image

hooks.prompt:
Dockerfile was modified. Rebuild the image:

```bash
docker compose up -d --build

# Clean rebuild
docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
```

PostToolUse.name: manifest-changed
PostToolUse.description: When __manifest__.py is modified, suggest updating the module

hooks.prompt:
__manifest__.py was modified. Update the module:

```bash
python -m odoo -c conf/<CONFIG>.conf -d <DB> -u <MODULE> --stop-after-init
```

Remember to bump the version field.

PostToolUse.name: new-model-file
PostToolUse.description: When a Python file in models/ is created, remind about imports and security

hooks.prompt:
New model file created. Ensure:
1. The class is imported in `models/__init__.py`
2. Access rules exist in `security/ir.model.access.csv`
3. Update the module:
```bash
python -m odoo -c conf/<CONFIG>.conf -d <DB> -u <MODULE> --stop-after-init
```

PostToolUse.name: venv-change
PostToolUse.description: After pip operations, remind to update requirements.txt

hooks.prompt: Check if the bash command involves pip install or pip uninstall. If so, remind to update requirements.txt. If not pip-related, say nothing.

PostToolUse.name: server-port-conflict
PostToolUse.description: Detect port 8069/8072 conflicts in command output

hooks.prompt: Check if the bash command output contains 'Address already in use' or port 8069/8072 errors. If so, suggest: Windows: `netstat -ano | findstr :8069` then `taskkill /PID <pid> /F`. Linux/Mac: `lsof -ti:8069 | xargs kill -9`. Or use `/odoo-stop`. If no port conflict, say nothing.
